data.body:
[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

The amount of rewards dropped in Mission (Normal) will be doubled.
Don't miss out on this chance!

🗓️Mission Normal x2: 5/27 (Mon) 7:00 PM – 6/3 (Mon) 6:59 PM (UTC)
